modal.resetDatabaseConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the database? This will delete all data.
modal.deleteDatabaseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all stored data? This cannot be undone.

toast.scanComplete: Scan complete, no new conversations found
toast.scanStarted: Library scan started in background tab
toast.feedbackFailed: Failed to send feedback. Please try again later.
toast.feedbackRateLimit: Please wait a moment before sending another feedback.
toast.interfaceUpdated: Google AI Studio interface updated. Please update the extension or wait for a fix.
toast.noContentToExport: No content found. Please open the conversation in {{platform}} so the extension can record it, then try again.
toast.importAiStudioSystemSuccess: Imported {{count}} system prompt(s) from AI Studio

toast.importAiStudioSystemFailed: Failed to import AI Studio system instructions

prompts.variablePromptModalIntro: You can use variables in prompt content with double curly braces. When you copy a prompt that contains variables, you'll be asked to fill in their values.
prompts.dropdownVariableHint: The first option is selected by default. Users pick from a dropdown list.
prompts.importHint: Inserts the referenced prompt's content inline. Supports nesting and detects circular references.
prompts.fillVariablesIntro: This prompt contains variables. Enter a value for each, then copy.
prompts.title: Title
prompts.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most {{count}} characters

about.title: About
about.appName: Better Sidebar for Gemini & AI Studio

sponsor.title: Support Us
sponsor.description: This is a free, open-source project built with love ❤️ If it makes your workflow better, a rating, a GitHub star, sharing with friends, or buying us a coffee means the world to us!

data.scanLibraryDescription: Scan your library to populate the explorer
data.importConversationDataDescription: Import conversation history from a ZIP exported from Google AI Studio
data.resetDatabaseDescription: Delete all stored data (folders, tags, cache). This cannot be undone.
data.exportDataDescription: Download a SQL dump backup of your organization
data.gdriveRestoreWarning: Restore will overwrite local data for the current profile. Messages are not synced.
data.gdriveNoBackupFound: No backup found on Google Drive for this profile
data.gdriveBackupConfirm: Are you sure you want to backup to Google Drive? This will overwrite your existing cloud backup for this profile.
data.gdriveRestoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore from Google Drive? This will overwrite your local data (messages are not affected).
data.gdriveUnsupported: Google Drive sync is not available in this browser
data.gdriveMergeSyncDesc: Smart merge: pulls remote changes, merges with local data, then pushes back.
data.gdriveAutoSyncDesc: Automatically sync every 25 minutes and after data changes

explorerSettings.defaultViewModeDescription: How items are displayed in the explorer
explorerSettings.defaultSortOrderDescription: How items are sorted by default
explorerSettings.name: Name
explorerSettings.ignoredFoldersDescription: List of folder names to hide (comma separated)
explorerSettings.enableRightClickRenameDescription: Allow renaming conversations via context menu (syncs with Gemini)

favorites.noFavoritesFound: No favorites found matching your filters.
favorites.noFavoritesYet: No favorites yet. Right-click on a file to add it to favorites.

node.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
node.hideConfirm: Are you sure you want to hide "{{name}}"?
node.deleteFolderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the folder "{{name}}" and all its contents?
node.deleteNote: Note: This will permanently delete the conversation.
node.hideNote: Note: Hidden items can be restored by importing the chat list.
node.deleteFolderNote: Note: Deleted folders cannot be restored, but conversations can be recovered by importing the chat list.
node.folderNotEmpty: This folder contains {{count}} conversation(s). Please use batch delete to remove conversations first.
node.folderNotEmptyNote: Folders can only be deleted when they are empty. Use batch selection to delete conversations inside the folder first.

batch.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items?
batch.hideConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to hide the selected items?

tags.noTagsYet: No tags yet. Create one above.
tags.deleteTagConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag?

popup.title: Better Sidebar
popup.description: Configure the platforms where Better Sidebar is active. Disabling a platform will stop the extension from running on that site entirely.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: We'd love to hear your thoughts, suggestions, or bug reports.
feedback.name: Name

dataManagement.resetDatabaseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all stored data? This cannot be undone.

search.title: Search
search.foldersIncludeTooltip: Separate multiple folder names with commas (e.g. 'project a, work, personal')
search.foldersExcludeTooltip: Separate multiple folder names with commas (e.g. 'archive, temp')
search.indexingInfoIntro: The extension only records and indexes conversations visited after installation. Previous history is not searchable by default.
search.indexingImport: Import History: Use the import feature to load your conversation history.
search.indexingScan: Scan Library: Ensure the Explorer has scanned and imported your library to index all titles.
search.whyNoOlder: Why can't I find older conversations?
search.notInConversation: Open a conversation to use this filter

importHistory.selectZipHint: Select the ZIP file downloaded from Google Drive containing your chat history.
importHistory.step2Click: Click the "Open in Drive" button at the top right.
importHistory.step3Click: In Google Drive, click the "AI Studio" folder dropdown and select "Download". Google will zip your files.
importHistory.step4Upload: Once downloaded, upload the ZIP file below.
importHistory.noteMatch: Conversations are matched by title. Some conversations may not be imported if the title cannot be found in the local database.
importHistory.noteImages: All image resources within the conversations will be ignored during import.

rating.title: Are you enjoying this extension?
rating.description: Your feedback is very important to us.
rating.rateDescription: A quick 5-star rating on the store would mean the world to us 🌟
rating.sorryDescription: Please let us know how we can improve. You can share your feedback through any of these channels:

onboarding.description: Supercharge your workflow on Google AI Studio, Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude with enhanced file management and beautiful UI.
onboarding.openSourceNote: Free & open-source, built and maintained by a solo developer. Thank you for your support!
onboarding.loginRequired: Please log in to the AI platform first — the sidebar activates on the platform page after you sign in.
onboarding.uiUpdateNote: If the sidebar stops working, it's likely due to a platform UI update. Please update the extension or wait for a fix — I'll patch it ASAP!
onboarding.feedbackNote: Run into a bug? Use the built-in feedback feature anytime — I'll get on it right away. Please don't leave a bad review before reaching out!

prompt.title: Welcome! Want a quick tour?
prompt.description: We'll show you around the sidebar's key features in just a few steps.

files.title: Conversation Explorer
files.description:
Browse, organize, and manage all your conversations. Create folders, drag to sort, and right-click for more options.
Recent conversations are scanned automatically. To view the full list, use the "Scan" option in the ⋮ menu.

search.title: Full-Text Search
search.description: Search across all your conversation content — not just titles. Filter by role, folder, and more.

prompts.title: Prompt Library
prompts.description: Save, organize, and reuse your favorite prompts. Supports variables and one-click copy.

tags.title: Tag Management
tags.description: Create tags to categorize your conversations. Quickly filter and find what you need.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Quickly access your starred conversations. Right-click any conversation to add it to favorites.

myStuff.title: My Stuff
myStuff.description: Quick access to your Gemini library — saved conversations, files, and more.

gems.title: Gems
gems.description: Access Gemini Gems — customized AI experts for specific tasks.

originalUI.title: Switch to Original Sidebar
originalUI.description: Toggle back to the platform's built-in sidebar anytime. Your data is always preserved.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Have suggestions or found a bug? Send us your feedback directly from here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize theme, layout, language, shortcuts, and more to fit your workflow.

profile.chooseProfile: Choose a profile to bind this account to, or create a new one.
profile.deleteProfileContent: This will remove the profile and its database ({{dbName}}). This cannot be undone.

geminiUI.title: Gemini UI Controls
geminiUI.subtitle: Adjust layout, visibility and features
geminiUI.geminiLogoDesc: Toggle Top Left Gemini logo visibility
geminiUI.aiDisclaimerDesc: Toggle center bottom AI Disclaimer visibility
geminiUI.upgradeButtonDesc: Toggle Top right "Upgrade Plan" button visibility
geminiUI.smartScrollbarDesc: Show conversation navigation on the right side

footer.madeWith: Better Sidebar • Made with ♥️ by Paper Crane Dev

gems.title: Gems
gems.noGemsDescription: Gems will appear here when synced from Gemini.
gems.hideGemConfirm: Are you sure you want to hide "{{name}}"? You can rescan to retrieve this Gem.
gems.deleteGemConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will permanently delete the Gem from Gemini.
gems.empty: No gems yet. Create one or sync from Gemini.

notebooks.title: Notebooks
notebooks.empty: No notebooks yet. Create one on Gemini.
notebooks.hideNotebookConfirm: Hide "{{name}}" from the sidebar? You can rescan to bring it back.
notebooks.deleteNotebookConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will permanently delete the Notebook from Gemini.

whatsNew.title: What's New in v{{version}}
whatsNew.welcome: Welcome to the latest version! Enjoy the updates.
whatsNew.enjoyingIt: Enjoying Better Sidebar? Show some love 👇

firstInstall.title: Import Conversation List?
firstInstall.description: By default, the extension only captures your recent conversations.
firstInstall.detail: You can import your full conversation list right now so everything shows up in the sidebar — including older chats you haven't opened yet.
firstInstall.hint: You can always do this later from the menu.
